description_long: This is a low-polygon stylized representation of a child standing with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The figure has a geometric, faceted head with a flat top and angular features, and the skin tone is a muted peach. The child is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, both rendered in simple, blocky shapes. The legs are straight and the feet are flat, with no visible footwear details. The arms are thin and elongated, with hands that taper to points, and the overall build is slender and youthful. The asset lacks fine details such as facial features, fingers, or accessories, emphasizing a minimalist, abstract aesthetic.
description: A stylized, low-poly child figure with arms outstretched, wearing a short-sleeve shirt and shorts. The body is angular and simplified, with no facial features or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, chest, and outstretched arms, with both legs and feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the flatness of the face and body evident.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and shorts, with both arms extended and legs straight.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
